Alpha Centauri A b Polyphemus

23 결정decisions · 22 gated · 1 divergence
identity 확정Gated범위 내In-window

body_type=미지근한 토성(temperate Saturn급 가스자이언트; H₂/He, 120 M⊕, Teq 225K, 물구름 Class I/II). designation=Alpha Centauri A b · cultural=Polyphemus(designations 블록). discoverability=관측-발견(category=candidate; 옵셔널 ResearchBodies) — 항성은 항상 가시. body_type/designation/cultural 확정. discoverability=실축 채택 — 옵셔널 ResearchBodies로 관측해 발견. 난도 매핑은 researchbodies-cfg 스킬이 canonical(references/db-mapping.md, 2026-06-22 개정). Polyphemus는 JWST 직접촬영 candidate → IGNORELEVELS T F F F(Easy만 시작 가시, Normal/Medium/Hard는 관측 발견), ONDISCOVERY에 실검출 인용(arXiv:2508.03812, Sanghi & Beichman). 항성 α Cen A=naked_eye → T T T T 항상 가시. emit 입력 = 스킬이 읽는 top-level discoverability 리스트(body/category/message/ref); 패치 방출 (emit_researchbodies_cfg.py)은 말미 일괄. [[project_nearstars_discoverability_researchbodies]]
body_type=temperate Saturn (temperate-Saturn-class gas giant; H₂/He, 120 M⊕, Teq 225K, water clouds Class I/II). designation=Alpha Centauri A b · cultural=Polyphemus (designations block). discoverability=observation-discovered (category=candidate; optional ResearchBodies) — the star is always visible. body_type/designation/cultural confirmed. discoverability=adopt the real measurement — discovered by observing with optional ResearchBodies. The difficulty mapping is canonical in the researchbodies-cfg skill (references/db-mapping.md, revised 2026-06-22). Polyphemus is a JWST direct-imaging candidate → IGNORELEVELS T F F F (visible from the start only at Easy; Normal/Medium/Hard require observational discovery), with the real detection cited in ONDISCOVERY (arXiv:2508.03812, Sanghi & Beichman). The star α Cen A=naked_eye → T T T T always visible. emit input = the top-level discoverability list the skill reads (body/category/message/ref); patch emission (emit_researchbodies_cfg.py) is batched at the end. [[project_nearstars_discoverability_researchbodies]]

2508.03812
orbit.semi_major_axis_au 확정Gated범위 내In-window

안정창 중앙. Beichman 선호 a<2 AU 패밀리에서 대표값 1.9→1.6으로 정합.
Center of the stability window. Reconciled the representative value from 1.9→1.6 within Beichman's preferred a<2 AU family.

Phase 3: 1.6 AU (Beichman 선호 a<2 AU 패밀리; 대표값 1.9→1.6 정합)
evidence 안정창 중앙. HZ-안정 1e5 yr 검증(궤도 1.37–1.84 AU 유지).Center of the stability window. HZ-stable verified over 1e5 yr (orbit stays 1.37–1.84 AU).

orbit.eccentricity 확정Gated범위 내In-window

안정창 중앙 e=0.1. 관측 선호 e≈0.4는 Kozai-불안정 → Canonical alternative로 보존.
Center of the stability window, e=0.1. The observationally preferred e≈0.4 is Kozai-unstable → preserved as a Canonical alternative.

evidence e≈0–0.18 안정창 중앙. 관측 e≈0.4는 KL-불안정(30 kyr 내 e→0.95, IAS15).Center of the e≈0–0.18 stability window. The observed e≈0.4 is KL-unstable (e→0.95 within 30 kyr, IAS15).
orbit.inclination_deg 확정Gated문서화 이탈Doc. divergence

AB면 대비 상호경사 16°(prograde). 절대 sky-frame inclination은 16° mutual을 보존하는 자유 emit 배향 (별도 고정 안 함). cfg는 AB 쌍성 궤도를 게임 프레임에 자유 배향하고 행성을 그 평면 대비 16° mutual·prograde로 둠. 절대 sky-plane inclination은 관측이 약/bimodal이라 별도 고정 불요 — 16° mutual만 보존하면 결정적으로 따라옴. a/e(1.6 AU, e=0.1)는 이미 emit 가능.
Mutual inclination 16° (prograde) relative to the AB plane. The absolute sky-frame inclination is a free emit orientation that preserves the 16° mutual (not separately pinned). The cfg orients the AB binary orbit freely in the game frame and places the planet at 16° mutual·prograde relative to that plane. The absolute sky-plane inclination need not be pinned since the observation is weak/bimodal — preserving only the 16° mutual makes it follow deterministically. a/e (1.6 AU, e=0.1) is already emittable.

필드Field값Value
inclination_deg16 deg
Phase 3: mutual_inclination_deg=16 (안정창 0–35°의 중앙); 관측 ~50°/~130°는 Kozai-불안정이라 미채택
evidence 관측 ~50°/~130°는 e≈0.4와 함께 Kozai-불안정. 16° mutual prograde는 안정창(0–35°) 중앙.
Observations ~50°/~130°, together with e≈0.4, are Kozai-unstable. 16° mutual prograde is the center of the stability window (0–35°).
divergence Beichman Table 4 관측 ~50°(prograde)/~130°(retrograde, i_AB=79.24°)는 e≈0.4와 함께 ECL Kozai-불안정 (e→0.95+, 위성계 붕괴). NearStars는 안정창(≲35°, ≳45°는 Kozai) 중앙 16° prograde 채택 — Phase 3 Canonical alternatives에 기록. 16° 저경사 prograde라 관측의 bimodal 모호성도 단일해로 해소.
Beichman Table 4 observations ~50° (prograde)/~130° (retrograde, i_AB=79.24°), together with e≈0.4, are ECL Kozai-unstable (e→0.95+, moon system disrupts). NearStars adopts 16° prograde at the center of the stability window (≲35°; ≳45° is Kozai) — recorded in the Phase 3 Canonical alternatives. Being 16° low-inclination prograde, it also resolves the observed bimodal ambiguity into a single solution.
2508.03812
orbit 확정Gated범위 내In-window

Ω/ω/mean_anomaly: 배향은 원래 자유였으나(16° mutual 보존) 이제 관측 검출 방향에 고정됨 — synthetic-noise seed 아님(아래 v3 노트 참조). spin_orbit =조석고정 아님(1.6 AU 가스자이언트, free ~10h 자전). lagrange_placement=없음. 절대 배향은 자유(관측 약/bimodal). 1.6 AU giant는 5 Gyr에도 미잠김 → free rotator. 캐넌 Poly-L4/L5 코오비탈 planetoid (337/611km)는 의도적 제외(오너 결정 2026-06-22 — 불필요; binary 트로이 안정성도 미검증). [2026-07-11 orbit emit-shaping v2] "자유"의 의미 결정은 유지하되, emitter가 숫자를 받도록 t=500yr osculating 스냅샷(scripts/snapshot_elements.py → results/_snapshot500/elements.log, 프레임: AB면 기준·x축=t=500의 A→B 방향)을 typed 기본값으로 병기. 어떤 값으로 바꿔도 합법(16° mutual만 보존 — 스냅샷 mutual 16.127°로 유지 확인). 스냅샷의 a/e(1.5936 AU/0.0756)는 게이트 설계값(1.6/0.1) 주위 진동의 순간값 — a/e/inc 행은 설계 앵커 유지. epoch=0(게임 epoch, Sol-Configs 관행). [2026-07-21 orbit emit-shaping v3 — 관측-방향 정합] 자유 배향을 실제 검출 기하에 고정. build() 시뮬은 하늘 앵커됨 (load.py가 쌍성 i/Ω/ω를 J2000 해에서 그대로 주입)이라 지구 하늘 위치각을 유도 가능. scripts/scan_pa_match.py가 궤적을 순방향으로 스윕해, 하늘 투영 PA가 JWST/MIRI 2024-08 검출(PA 83.5° 북→동, Beichman 2025 Table 2 S1)에 가장 가까운 위상을 선택 — 83.66°(오차 0.16°). 그 관측-에포크 상태를 게임 태양계 에포크(JD 2433282.5 = 1950.0)로 평균근점이각을 통해 되감음(주기 1.9307년, Δt 74.6년 = 38.64바퀴): ma_2024 321.46° → ma_1950 90.05°. 정합 대상은 방향뿐. PA 83.5° 선상에서 채택 궤도(1.6 AU/e=0.1)는 투영 0.75 AU까지만 닿음(관측 ~2.0 AU) — 그 PA가 투영 타원의 단축 근처이고 장축은 실측 쌍성 노드(Ω=204.85°) 방향에 놓이기 때문. 이 분리 부족은 안정성-선택 궤도의 본질적 한계로 수용 (오너 결정 2026-07-21). 캐비엇: 궤도면 요소는 t*≈1957 osculating 값(1950까지 세차 ~0.1°, 무시가능), 되감기는 인게임 주기가 1.9307년이라는 전제.
Ω/ω/mean_anomaly: orientation was free (preserves 16° mutual) — now PINNED to the observed detection direction, not synthetic-noise seeded (see v3 note below). spin_orbit = not tidally locked (1.6 AU gas giant, free ~10h rotation). lagrange_placement=none. Absolute orientation is free (observation weak/bimodal). A 1.6 AU giant remains unlocked even at 5 Gyr → free rotator. The canon Poly-L4/L5 co-orbital planetoids (337/611km) are intentionally excluded (owner decision 2026-06-22 — unnecessary; binary Trojan stability also unverified). [2026-07-11 orbit emit-shaping v2] The decision on what "free" means is kept, but so the emitter receives numbers, a t=500yr osculating snapshot (scripts/snapshot_elements.py → results/_snapshot500/elements.log; frame: AB-plane reference, x-axis=A→B direction at t=500) is provided alongside as the typed default. Changing to any value is legal (preserve only the 16° mutual — snapshot mutual confirmed at 16.127°). The snapshot's a/e (1.5936 AU/0.0756) is an instantaneous value oscillating around the gated design values (1.6/0.1) — the a/e/inc rows keep the design anchors. epoch=0 (game epoch, Sol-Configs convention). [2026-07-21 orbit emit-shaping v3 — observation-direction match] The free orientation is now pinned to the real detection geometry. The build() sim is sky-anchored (load.py feeds the binary i/Ω/ω verbatim from the J2000 solution), so an Earth-sky position angle is derivable. scripts/scan_pa_match.py sweeps the trajectory forward-only and picks the phase whose sky-projected PA best matches the JWST/MIRI Aug-2024 detection (PA 83.5° E of N; Beichman 2025 Table 2 S1) — match 83.66° (err 0.16°). That matched (observation-epoch) state is then rewound to the game solar-system epoch (JD 2433282.5 = 1950.0) via the mean anomaly (period 1.9307 yr, Δt 74.6 yr = 38.64 orbits): ma_2024 321.46° → ma_1950 90.05°. Only DIRECTION is matched: along PA 83.5° the adopted 1.6 AU/e=0.1 orbit reaches only ~0.75 AU projected (obs ~2.0 AU) because that PA sits near the minor axis of the projected ellipse (the major axis lies along the real binary node Ω=204.85°); the shortfall is intrinsic to the stability-selected orbit and accepted (owner decision 2026-07-21). Caveats: plane elements are the t*≈1957 osculating values (precession ~0.1° to 1950, negligible); the rewind assumes the in-game period equals 1.9307 yr.

lagrange_placementnone
Poly-L4/L5 코오비탈 planetoid 의도적 제외 (오너 2026-06-22)
evidence 절대 배향은 자유(관측 약/bimodal). 1.6 AU giant는 5 Gyr에도 미잠김 → free rotator. 캐넌 Poly-L4/L5 코오비탈 planetoid(337/611km)는 의도적 제외(오너 결정 2026-06-22 — 불필요; binary 트로이 안정성 미검증).
Absolute orientation is free (observation weak/bimodal). A 1.6 AU giant remains unlocked even at 5 Gyr → free rotator. The canon Poly-L4/L5 co-orbital planetoids (337/611km) are intentionally excluded (owner decision 2026-06-22 — unnecessary; binary Trojan stability unverified).
2508.038142508.03812
bulk.radius 확정Gated범위 내In-window

1.0 R_Jup (71,492 km), ρ ~0.47 g/cc (120 M⊕ + 1.0 R_Jup). Beichman §5.3 두 해 중 ring-model(반경 1.0 R_Jup + 고리가 초과 단면적 담당)을 채택. 질량은 두 해 모두 ~120 M⊕(차이는 반경뿐). appearance.rings와 커플링 — 작은 반경은 고리가 있어야만 성립하므로 고리 유지 결정과 정합. ring-free 1.1–1.15는 보존된 대안. 직전 커밋의 1.05 R_Jup/0.40은 raw 이미징 추정치를 잘못 옮긴 것 → cfg-ready는 1.0/~0.47. canon "목성보다 밀도 큼"(ρ>1.33, →220 M⊕↑)은 미채택(관측 우선).
1.0 R_Jup (71,492 km), ρ ~0.47 g/cc (120 M⊕ + 1.0 R_Jup). Of the two solutions in Beichman §5.3, the ring-model (radius 1.0 R_Jup + rings account for the excess cross-section) is adopted. The mass is ~120 M⊕ in both solutions (the difference is radius only). Coupled with appearance.rings — a small radius only holds if rings exist, so it is consistent with the decision to keep the rings. The ring-free 1.1–1.15 is a preserved alternative. The prior commit's 1.05 R_Jup/0.40 was a mis-transcription of the raw imaging estimate → cfg-ready is 1.0/~0.47. The canon "denser than Jupiter" (ρ>1.33, →220 M⊕+) is not adopted (observation first).

필드Field값Value
radius1.0 R_jup
Phase 3: 1.0 R_Jup (ring-model tie-break; ring-free 대안은 1.1–1.15 R_Jup)
evidence Beichman §5.3 두 해 중 ring-model(반경 1.0 R_Jup + 고리가 초과 단면적 담당)을 채택. 질량은 두 해 모두 ~120 M⊕(차이는 반경뿐). appearance.rings와 커플링 — 작은 반경은 고리가 있어야만 성립. ring-free 1.1–1.15는 보존된 대안.
Of the two solutions in Beichman §5.3, the ring-model (radius 1.0 R_Jup + rings account for the excess cross-section) is adopted. The mass is ~120 M⊕ in both solutions (the difference is radius only). Coupled with appearance.rings — a small radius only holds if rings exist. The ring-free 1.1–1.15 is a preserved alternative.
2508.03814
bulk.geopotential_j2 확정Gated방법론 도출Methodology-derived

J2 ≈ 0.023 (1차 RD, 절단보정 ~0.025–0.026); 범위 0.017–0.033; J4 ≈ -0.001; reference_radius = 1.0 R_Jup. 논문 근거(derived-value 규칙). Radau–Darwin 관계식 — Helled, Anderson, Schubert, Stevenson 2011 eq.3 (arXiv:1109.1627), NMoI=(2/3)[1-(2/5)√(5m/(m+3J2)-1)], m=ω²R̄³/GM(평균반경). 구조 가정 NMoI=C/MR²=0.23 (범위 0.21–0.26): 거대행성 실측(목성 0.265, 토성 ~0.21, 빙왕성 ~0.22–0.24; Helled+2011/2020 arXiv:2007.10783, Fortney+2018 arXiv:1609.06324)에서 0.4 M_Jup·저밀도(0.47)는 토성보다 덜 응축→NMoI 약간 높음. 폴리페무스 m≈0.19(평균반경, f≈0.13 자기일관 반복). → J2≈0.023(central). calibration 검증: 같은 식이 목성 J2 -0.0%, 토성 -10.3% 재현(알려진 1차 오차). m≈0.19가 토성(0.14)보다 커 1차 절단이 과소예측 → 실제 ~10–20%↑(보정 ~0.025–0.026). 불확실성 폭은 NMoI 가정이 지배. 가스자이언트=축대칭→zonal only(j2[+j4]). 입력 calibration J2: 목성=Iess2018, 토성=Durante2017. 선행조건 해소(2026-06-20): J2=0.023을 위성 시뮬에 주입 완료 — reboundx가 rebound 5.x 비호환이라 자체 구현(scripts/j2.py, rebound additional_forces, M&D 벡터형, 해석 세차율과 <0.1% 검증). 이 J2가 위성 궤도 결정을 실제로 뒤집음(satellites axis 참조): off-resonance 135k 갭은 J2에도 안정, 3:2-락은 J2 detuning으로 Hades 이탈. emit 값 불변(J2≈0.023, reference_radius 1.0 R_Jup). 2026-06-25 figure 패스가 독립적으로 재확인(body-figure-methodology.md) — 시각 oblate 메시 a:b:c ≈ 1.149:1.149:1.0 (VertexHeightOblateAdvanced, base radius=극반경). Principia가 천체간 연산에도 J2 적용 → 위성 동역학의 입력이었고, 그 입력이 결정적이었음.
J2 ≈ 0.023 (first-order RD, truncation-corrected ~0.025–0.026); range 0.017–0.033; J4 ≈ -0.001; reference_radius = 1.0 R_Jup. Paper-grounded (derived-value rule). The Radau–Darwin relation — Helled, Anderson, Schubert, Stevenson 2011 eq.3 (arXiv:1109.1627), NMoI=(2/3)[1-(2/5)√(5m/(m+3J2)-1)], m=ω²R̄³/GM (mean radius). The structural assumption NMoI=C/MR²=0.23 (range 0.21–0.26): from giant-planet measurements (Jupiter 0.265, Saturn ~0.21, ice giants ~0.22–0.24; Helled+2011/2020 arXiv:2007.10783, Fortney+2018 arXiv:1609.06324), a 0.4 M_Jup·low-density (0.47) body is less condensed than Saturn → NMoI slightly higher. Polyphemus m≈0.19 (mean radius, self-consistently iterated with f≈0.13). → J2≈0.023 (central). calibration check: the same equation reproduces Jupiter J2 -0.0% and Saturn -10.3% (a known first-order error). m≈0.19 being larger than Saturn's (0.14), the first-order truncation underpredicts → actual ~10–20% higher (correction ~0.025–0.026). The uncertainty span is dominated by the NMoI assumption. Gas giant = axisymmetric → zonal only (j2[+j4]). Input calibration J2: Jupiter=Iess2018, Saturn=Durante2017. Prerequisite resolved (2026-06-20): J2=0.023 injected into the moon sim — since reboundx is incompatible with rebound 5.x, a custom implementation was used (scripts/j2.py, rebound additional_forces, M&D vector form, verified to <0.1% against the analytic precession rate). This J2 actually flips the moon-orbit decisions (see satellites axis): the off-resonance 135k gap is stable even with J2, while the 3:2 lock has Hades escape via J2 detuning. The emit values are unchanged (J2≈0.023, reference_radius 1.0 R_Jup). On 2026-06-25 the figure pass independently re-confirmed this (body-figure-methodology.md) — the visual oblate mesh a:b:c ≈ 1.149:1.149:1.0 (VertexHeightOblateAdvanced, base radius=polar radius). Principia applies J2 to inter-body computations too → it was an input to the moon dynamics, and that input was decisive.

필드Field값Value
geopotential_j20.023 · R_ref 71492 km
Phase 3: J2 ≈ 0.023 (범위 0.017–0.033; 절단보정 ~0.025–0.026)
reference_radius71492 km
j4-0.001
evidence Radau–Darwin(Helled+2011 eq.3, arXiv:1109.1627) NMoI=0.23 가정 → J2≈0.023(central), 범위 0.017–0.033. calibration: 같은 식이 목성 -0.0%·토성 -10.3% 재현(알려진 1차 오차). J2=0.023을 위성 시뮬에 주입 검증 완료(scripts/j2.py, 해석 세차율과 <0.1%) — 135k 갭 안정·3:2-락 이탈로 위성 결정을 뒤집음. figure 패스가 독립 재확인(body-figure-methodology.md).
Radau–Darwin (Helled+2011 eq.3, arXiv:1109.1627) with NMoI=0.23 assumption → J2≈0.023 (central), range 0.017–0.033. calibration: the same equation reproduces Jupiter -0.0%·Saturn -10.3% (a known first-order error). J2=0.023 injected into the moon sim and verified (scripts/j2.py, <0.1% against the analytic precession rate) — flips the moon decisions via 135k-gap stability·3:2-lock escape. The figure pass independently re-confirmed (body-figure-methodology.md).
docs/reference/body-figure-methodology.md
bulk.obliquity 확정Gated오너 확정Owner override

obliquity 5° = Polyphemus 자전축(적도면)이 공전면에서 5° 기움. **위성계는 공통 노드선 공유(coherent warp)** — 시뮬 로더가 전 위성에 부모 노드 부여(load.add_hypotheticals), 경사는 design-of-record 유지(inner Dante/Hades/ Pandora ~9–11°·역행 Cassandra/Chaos ~176/179°, Polyphemus 공전면 대비 — phase3/stability-sim/hypotheticals/ alpha_centauri.json). **고리는 5° 적도면이 아니라 Chaos 궤도면**(Chaos 생성 E-고리 → shepherd 위성면; Chaos ~180° 근접-공면 역행이라 거의 공전면). obliquity 5°·위성 ~10°·고리 Chaos면은 서로 별개 축. 오너-오버라이드 근거: Phase 3 27°(토성-유추)는 "고리 기울기용"이었으나 고리를 Chaos 궤도면에 눕혀 근거 소멸 → obliquity 5°로 낮춤 (Polyphemus 자전축만; STABLE 재검 results/_obliq5, Pandora e≤0.0123). 위성계는 공통 노드선 coherent — design-of-record 경사 유지(1000yr STABLE _finalv2). **고리 ≠ 5° 적도면; 고리 = Chaos 궤도면**(Chaos 생성 E-고리) — 2026-07-14 오너 정정. 이전 "위성+고리 5° 적도면 공유" 표기는 위성 경사·고리면 둘 다 부정확했음.
obliquity 5° = Polyphemus's spin axis (equatorial plane) tilted 5° from its orbital plane. **The moon system shares a common node line (coherent warp)** — the sim loader gives every moon a parent node (load.add_hypotheticals); inclinations keep the design-of-record (inner Dante/Hades/ Pandora ~9–11°, retrograde Cassandra/Chaos ~176/179°, relative to Polyphemus's orbital plane — phase3/stability-sim/hypotheticals/alpha_centauri.json). **The ring lies not in the 5° equatorial plane but in Chaos's orbital plane** (Chaos-fed E-ring → shepherd-moon plane; Chaos is near-coplanar retrograde at ~180°, so almost the orbital plane). obliquity 5°, moons ~10°, and the ring's Chaos plane are three separate axes. Owner-override rationale: Phase 3's 27° (Saturn analogy) was "for the ring tilt", but laying the ring in Chaos's orbital plane removed that basis → obliquity lowered to 5° (Polyphemus spin axis only; STABLE re-check results/_obliq5, Pandora e≤0.0123). The moon system stays node-coherent — design-of-record inclinations kept (1000yr STABLE _finalv2). **Ring ≠ 5° equatorial plane; ring = Chaos orbital plane** (Chaos-fed E-ring) — owner correction 2026-07-14. The earlier "moons + ring share the 5° equatorial plane" wording was wrong on both the moon inclinations and the ring plane.

필드Field값Value
obliquity5 deg
Phase 3: 27° (토성-유추 tie-break, 고리 기울기용 → 폐기)
evidence 재시뮬(TRACE 1000yr J2, --j2-obliquity-deg 5, results/_obliq5) STABLE — Pandora e≤0.0123. 일식 검증: θ(Pandora면↔Polyphemus 궤도면) 0–18.9°, 평균 9.5°, duty 94.2%(0°는 75.5%) — 5°가 동반성 요동을 부분 상쇄해 일식이 오히려 잦음. 동반성 섭동으로 θ 요동→"일식 시즌" 자연발생.
Re-sim (TRACE 1000yr J2, --j2-obliquity-deg 5, results/_obliq5) STABLE — Pandora e≤0.0123. Eclipse check: θ (Pandora plane ↔ Polyphemus orbital plane) 0–18.9°, mean 9.5°, duty 94.2% (75.5% at 0°) — the 5° tilt partly cancels the companion's forcing, so eclipses are actually more frequent. Companion perturbation makes θ oscillate → "eclipse seasons" arise naturally.
bulk.rotation_period 확정Gated범위 내In-window

10.35 h = Avatar canon 자전 10.1–10.6 h의 중간값([GAME]; 핵/자기장 기준 9.7 h — polyphemus-art-direction.md 2026-06-19 조사, line 235–236). 기존 "10 h 목성/토성 유추 conf low"는 오귀속이었음 — canon값이 실재. 자이언트라 조석고정 아님. 이 빠른 자전이 적도팽대(flattening 0.13, q~0.19, J₂ 0.023 — bulk anchor)의 물리 근거.
10.35 h = midpoint of the Avatar canon rotation 10.1–10.6 h ([GAME]; 9.7 h in the core/magnetic-field frame — polyphemus-art-direction.md 2026-06-19 survey, line 235–236). The former "10 h Jupiter/Saturn analogy, conf low" was a misattribution — the canon value is real. Being a giant, it is not tidally locked. This fast rotation is the physical basis for the equatorial bulge (flattening 0.13, q~0.19, J₂ 0.023 — bulk anchor).

필드Field값Value
rotation_period10.35 h
Phase 3: 10 h (구 오귀속: 목성/토성 유추 conf low)
evidence Avatar canon [GAME] 자전 10.1–10.6 h(polyphemus-art-direction.md line 235–236)의 중간값 채택. 빠른 자전 → 큰 적도팽대(flattening 0.13, q~0.19)와 정합.Adopts the midpoint of the Avatar canon [GAME] rotation 10.1–10.6 h (polyphemus-art-direction.md line 235–236). Fast rotation → consistent with a large equatorial bulge (flattening 0.13, q~0.19).

mass=120 M⊕(0.38 M_Jup, Phase 3 토대값 — J2·밀도·조석·dynamo 입력). spin_axis_orientation=obliquity 5°의 방위, 자유 emit(de-perfect)이되 일식 duty 94% eclipse-favorable 범위. internal_heat=미미(T_int<110K, 복사평형 지배, 자발광 아님 — 내부플럭스 ~insolation의 ≲6%; 늙은 저질량 토성급이라 잔여열 작음). age=5.3 Gyr (α Cen A 상속). insolation-set(eps Ind A b 자발광과 대비). 작은 내부열도 띠/날씨는 구동. spin_axis 절대방위는 emit-noise(eclipse bound).
mass=120 M⊕ (0.38 M_Jup, Phase 3 foundation value — input to J2·density·tides·dynamo). spin_axis_orientation=the azimuth of the 5° obliquity, free emit (de-perfect) but within the eclipse-favorable range at 94% eclipse duty. internal_heat=negligible (T_int<110K, radiative equilibrium dominant, not self-luminous — internal flux ~≲6% of insolation; being an old low-mass Saturn-class body, residual heat is small). age=5.3 Gyr (inherited from α Cen A). insolation-set (contrast with the self-luminous eps Ind A b). Even the small internal heat drives the bands/weather. The absolute azimuth of spin_axis is emit-noise (eclipse bound).

atmosphere 확정Gated범위 내In-window

composition: H₂/He bulk, [M/H]+0.5~1.0(Thorngren2016 질량-금속성=토성급 예상값, 가정 아님), 응결 구름종 =H₂O·NH₄SH(NH₃는 225K서 비응결 — skin T≈189K가 응결점 150K에 못 닿아 기체 잔류; appearance.banding 정합), C/O 2.5×(§5.2). pressure: 1 bar 기준 앵커. temperature: 구름덱 225K 앵커. scale_height: 프로파일서 도출. breathability: 불가(atmosphereContainsOxygen=false). greenhouse: 표면 없어 surface-lift 없음(구름덱=복사층, 깊은 곳은 단열선으로 뜨겁되 미렌더). escape: 무시(거대질량). temperature/pressure는 스칼라 아님 — emit서 cool-giant 복사대류 격자(Sonora Bobcat 2107.07434 / Fortney2007 astro-ph/0612671, _bib/gas-giant-atmosphere.yaml)로 temperatureCurve+pressureCurve 생성, 앵커=구름덱 225K/1 bar. great-season은 temperatureEccentricityBiasCurve (e=0.1>임계라 OK, divide-by-zero 가드 통과). 분류 Class II 물구름(Sudarsky2003). Teq 225K는 A_B=0.3 가정 — Class II 물구름 알베도 0.5–0.8이면 더 차가울 여지(여전히 Class II). 보수적 채택.
composition: H₂/He bulk, [M/H]+0.5~1.0 (Thorngren2016 mass-metallicity = Saturn-class expected value, not an assumption), condensing cloud species =H₂O·NH₄SH (NH₃ does not condense at 225K — skin T≈189K never reaches the 150K condensation point, so it stays gaseous; consistent with appearance.banding), C/O 2.5× (§5.2). pressure: 1 bar reference anchor. temperature: cloud-deck 225K anchor. scale_height: derived from the profile. breathability: not possible (atmosphereContainsOxygen=false). greenhouse: no surface, so no surface-lift (cloud deck=radiative layer, the deep interior is hot along the adiabat but not rendered). escape: negligible (giant mass). temperature/pressure are not scalars — at emit the cool-giant radiative-convective grid (Sonora Bobcat 2107.07434 / Fortney2007 astro-ph/0612671, _bib/gas-giant-atmosphere.yaml) generates temperatureCurve+pressureCurve, anchored at cloud-deck 225K/1 bar. The great-season uses temperatureEccentricityBiasCurve (e=0.1>threshold so OK, passes the divide-by-zero guard). Classification Class II water clouds (Sudarsky2003). Teq 225K assumes A_B=0.3 — with Class II water-cloud albedo 0.5–0.8 it could be colder (still Class II). Adopted conservatively.

pressure1 bar
Phase 3: 1 bar 기준 앵커
temperature225 K
Phase 3: 구름덱 225K 앵커 (A_B=0.3 가정)
scale_height프로파일서 도출
breathabilityFalse
greenhousenone (표면 없어 surface-lift 없음)
escapenegligible (거대질량)
evidence temperature/pressure는 emit서 cool-giant 복사대류 격자(Sonora Bobcat / Fortney2007)로 curve 생성, 앵커=구름덱 225K/1 bar. great-season은 temperatureEccentricityBiasCurve(e=0.1>임계라 OK). 분류 Class II 물구름(Sudarsky2003). Teq 225K는 A_B=0.3 가정 — Class II 알베도 0.5–0.8이면 더 차가울 여지(보수적 채택).
temperature/pressure generate curves at emit via the cool-giant radiative-convective grid (Sonora Bobcat / Fortney2007), anchored at cloud-deck 225K/1 bar. The great-season uses temperatureEccentricityBiasCurve (e=0.1>threshold so OK). Classification Class II water clouds (Sudarsky2003). Teq 225K assumes A_B=0.3 — with Class II albedo 0.5–0.8 it could be colder (adopted conservatively).
2107.07434astro-ph/0612671
appearance.banding 확정Gated범위 내In-window

흰 zone(물/NH4SH 구름) + 적갈 chromophore 띠(목성 적색 70%) + 슬레이트블루 belt(구름틈 Rayleigh)의 3색 띠 + 중위도 대형 폭풍 1개(가장 깊은 구름틈=가장 진한 azure). 흰 zone = 물/NH4SH 구름탑(#eef1f4, Sudarsky Class II). 225K는 skin T≈189K로 NH3 응결점 150K에 끝내 못 닿아(목성과 달리 대류권계면이 150K까지 안 식음) 암모니아는 기체로 남고 구름 안 됨 → 가시 덱은 물/NH4SH. 적갈 chromophore 띠 = NH4SH 복사 생성물(황 화합물) + CH4/PH3 광분해 탄화수소 톨린이 청·UV 흡수 → 적갈(cold-giant 광화학 in-window); 금색→목성 belt 적색 70%로 오너 조정. 슬레이트블루 belt = 얕은 구름틈에 드러난 깊은 H2/He 대기의 Rayleigh 산란(haze가 채도 감쇄). 중위도 대형 폭풍 = 가장 깊은 구름틈이라 Rayleigh 컬럼이 가장 길어 가장 진한 azure — 목성 대적점의 역(솟은 적색 점이 아닌 가라앉은 파란 눈), Avatar canon "제일 짙은 파란 폭풍"과 일치. 파랑은 메탄 흡수 아닌 Rayleigh라 cobalt 과채도 우려 불필요. 목성형 난류 밴딩 = art-forward documented-divergence(appearance.clouds 행 및 아래 banding_morphology 필드). 반사광 구름 띠 색의 방법론 근거 = docs/reference/atmosphere-reflected-color-methodology.md (깊은 구름틈일수록 Rayleigh 더 파랑 + 황/톨린 chromophore 색조군 + α Cen A=G2V 태양쌍둥이라 white point≈태양 → 색이 reddening 없이 거의 그대로 렌더; Polyphemus가 그 문서의 worked example). composition-color.md(재진입 발광)와는 다른 메커니즘. 흰색만 Phase3 hex 근거, 적갈/청/azure는 그 물리 창 내 오너 art tie-break. 응결 층서 근거 = Sudarsky 2000/2003 + Morley 2014 (docs/phase3/_bib/gas-giant-atmosphere.yaml 핀). 오너-오버라이드(banding_morphology): 목성형 난류 밴딩은 art-forward 선택 — Polyphemus는 T_int<110K(내부열 낮음)라 물리적으론 토성처럼 잔잔한 zonal band가 더 자연스러움. 시각 드라마(interesting-first)로 난류 밴딩 채택, silent 아닌 명시 발산. (형태학 세부는 appearance.clouds 행과 동일 결정.)
A three-color banding of white zones (water/NH4SH clouds) + red-brown chromophore bands (Jupiter red 70%) + slate-blue belts (cloud-gap Rayleigh) + one large mid-latitude storm (the deepest cloud gap = the most saturated azure). White zones = water/NH4SH cloud tops (#eef1f4, Sudarsky Class II). At 225K the skin T≈189K never reaches the NH3 condensation point 150K (unlike Jupiter, the tropopause does not cool to 150K), so ammonia stays gaseous and does not form clouds → the visible deck is water/NH4SH. The red-brown chromophore bands = NH4SH radiolysis products (sulfur compounds) + CH4/PH3 photolysis hydrocarbon tholins absorbing blue·UV → red-brown (cold-giant photochemistry, in-window); the gold was owner-adjusted to Jupiter belt red 70%. The slate-blue belts = Rayleigh scattering of the deep H2/He atmosphere exposed in shallow cloud gaps (haze attenuates the saturation). The large mid-latitude storm = the deepest cloud gap, so the Rayleigh column is longest and the azure most saturated — the inverse of Jupiter's Great Red Spot (not a raised red spot but a sunken blue eye), matching the Avatar canon "the darkest blue storm". The blue is Rayleigh, not methane absorption, so there is no cobalt over-saturation concern. Jovian turbulent banding = an art-forward documented-divergence (the appearance.clouds row and the banding_morphology field below). The methodology basis for reflected cloud-band color = docs/reference/atmosphere-reflected-color-methodology.md (deeper cloud gaps → more blue Rayleigh + a sulfur/tholin chromophore hue family + α Cen A=G2V solar twin, so white point≈Sun → the color renders almost as-is without reddening; Polyphemus is that document's worked example). A different mechanism from composition-color.md (reentry luminescence). Only the white has a Phase 3 hex basis; the red-brown/blue/azure are owner art tie-breaks within that physical window. The condensation- stratigraphy basis = Sudarsky 2000/2003 + Morley 2014 (pinned in docs/phase3/_bib/gas-giant-atmosphere.yaml). Owner-override (banding_morphology): Jovian turbulent banding is an art-forward choice — Polyphemus has T_int<110K (low internal heat), so physically a calm Saturn-like zonal band would be more natural; turbulent banding was adopted for visual drama (interesting-first), an explicit rather than silent divergence (same decision as the appearance.clouds row).

필드Field값Value
banding_base#eef1f4
Phase 3: #eef1f4 (물/NH4SH zone, Sudarsky Class II)
banding_chromophore#b4784e window #a8703f–#bc8055
banding_belt#647e96 window #5a6e82–#6e8499
banding_storm_eye#214a72 window #1e4068–#2a5480
구름 렌더 tint — biome-map 'The Eye' 픽셀 #244C8A(gameplay.science_biomes)와 파이프라인이 달라 의도적으로 별개
banding_morphologyJovian turbulent banding (band 경계 소용돌이·festoon 多)
evidence 흰 zone = 물/NH4SH 구름탑(Sudarsky Class II). 적갈 chromophore = NH4SH 복사 생성물 + CH4/PH3 광분해 톨린(cold-giant 광화학 in-window). 슬레이트블루 belt = 구름틈 Rayleigh. 폭풍 눈 = 가장 깊은 Rayleigh 컬럼(대적점의 역). 색 근거 = atmosphere-reflected-color-methodology.md; α Cen A=G2V라 white point≈태양.
White zones = water/NH4SH cloud tops (Sudarsky Class II). Red-brown chromophore = NH4SH radiolysis products + CH4/PH3 photolysis tholins (cold-giant photochemistry, in-window). Slate-blue belts = cloud-gap Rayleigh. Storm eye = the deepest Rayleigh column (inverse of the Great Red Spot). Color basis = atmosphere-reflected-color-methodology.md; α Cen A=G2V so white point≈Sun.
appearance.haze 확정Gated범위 내In-window

광화학 크로모포어+haze로 적갈 띠 (NH4SH 황 + CH4/PH3 광분해 탄화수소 톨린). 광화학 크로모포어 haze는 cold-giant 유추로 정당 — 목성(Teq~110K)·토성(~90K)이 UV 광분해(NH3/CH4/PH3→탄화수소/톨린)로 색소 haze를 보임. Polyphemus(225K, H2/He+CH4, NH3 비응결, G2V UV)는 둘보다 따뜻해 메커니즘이 오히려 잘 성립. 오너 조정으로 토성형 금색이 아닌 목성 belt 적색 70%(색소 코팅 더 두껍게) 채택 — 여전히 광화학 색소 물리 창 안. composition-color.md은 haze 크로모포어를 bulk 밖 별도 층으로 다룸(Titan 톨린/sub-Neptune 광화학). 적갈색은 반사광이라 plasma yaml서 안 나옴(composition-color.md=재진입 플라스마). 목성-belt 창 #a8703f–#bc8055 내 오너 tie-break, 기본 #b4784e.
Red-brown bands from photochemical chromophores + haze (NH4SH sulfur + CH4/PH3 photolysis hydrocarbon tholins). Photochemical chromophore haze is justified by cold-giant analogy — Jupiter (Teq~110K)·Saturn (~90K) show pigment haze from UV photolysis (NH3/CH4/PH3→hydrocarbons/tholins). Polyphemus (225K, H2/He+CH4, NH3 non-condensing, G2V UV) is warmer than both, so the mechanism holds even better. By owner adjustment, it adopts Jupiter belt red 70% (thicker pigment coating), not Saturn-type gold — still within the photochemical-pigment physical window. composition-color.md treats haze chromophores as a layer separate from the bulk (Titan tholins/sub-Neptune photochemistry). The red-brown is reflected light, so it does not come from the plasma yaml (composition-color.md=reentry plasma). Owner tie-break within the Jupiter-belt window #a8703f–#bc8055, default #b4784e.

필드Field값Value
haze#b4784e window #a8703f–#bc8055
evidence 광화학 크로모포어 haze는 cold-giant 유추로 정당 — 목성/토성이 UV 광분해로 색소 haze를 보임. Polyphemus (225K, G2V UV)는 더 따뜻해 메커니즘이 잘 성립. 오너 조정으로 목성 belt 적색 70% 채택(광화학 색소 물리 창 안).
Photochemical chromophore haze is justified by cold-giant analogy — Jupiter/Saturn show pigment haze from UV photolysis. Polyphemus (225K, G2V UV) is warmer, so the mechanism holds well. By owner adjustment, adopts Jupiter belt red 70% (within the photochemical-pigment physical window).
appearance.clouds 확정Gated오너 확정Owner override

구름덱 형태학 = 목성형 난류 밴딩(band 경계 소용돌이·festoon 多) + 중위도 단일 대형 anticyclone(폭풍 색/메커니즘은 banding 행). 구름 coverage = Phase 3 0.9. 대형 폭풍 = 가라앉은 Rayleigh 파란 눈(Avatar canon), 색은 banding cfg_colors 폭풍 눈. 형태학은 emit 시 구름 텍스처(EVE)/PQS로 구현 — 본 행은 art 의도, 색 값은 banding 행에 통합. 오너-오버라이드 근거: 목성형 난류는 art-forward 선택 — Polyphemus는 T_int<110K(내부열 낮음)라 물리적으론 토성처럼 잔잔한 zonal band가 더 자연스러움. 시각 드라마(interesting-first)로 난류 밴딩 채택, silent 아닌 명시 발산.
Cloud-deck morphology = Jovian turbulent banding (many band-boundary vortices·festoons) + a single large mid-latitude anticyclone (storm color/mechanism in the banding row). Cloud coverage = Phase 3 0.9. The large storm = a sunken Rayleigh blue eye (Avatar canon), colored per the banding cfg_colors storm eye. The morphology is realized at emit via cloud textures (EVE)/PQS — this row is art intent, the color values are integrated in the banding row. Owner-override rationale: Jovian turbulence is an art-forward choice — since Polyphemus has T_int<110K (low internal heat), physically a calm Saturn-like zonal band would be more natural. Turbulent banding was adopted for visual drama (interesting-first), an explicit rather than silent divergence.

필드Field값Value
cloudsJovian turbulent banding + 중위도 단일 anticyclone
cloud_coverage0.9
Phase 3: 0.9 (Phase 3)
evidence 구름 coverage = Phase 3 0.9. 대형 폭풍 = 가라앉은 Rayleigh 파란 눈(Avatar canon), 색은 banding cfg_colors 폭풍 눈.
Cloud coverage = Phase 3 0.9. The large storm = a sunken Rayleigh blue eye (Avatar canon), colored per the banding cfg_colors storm eye.
appearance.aurora 확정Gated오너 확정Owner override

극 rose-magenta 오로라 (Pandora의 cyan 생물발광과 의도적 대비: 행성 핑크, 달 청록). H2/He 대기가 색을 *고정*(선택 아님): H Balmer-α 적색 + H2 Fulcher / Balmer-β/γ 보라. 원자 산소 없어 지구식 녹색 불가. 대부분 출력은 UV(가시 오로라 희미) — 발산은 "보이게 연출"한 점. sRGB는 emit 시 element_plasma_colors.yaml / molecular_plasma_colors.yaml에서 추출. 오너-오버라이드 근거: Phase 3 aurora_present=false(medium) — 조용한 G2V 항성풍(log R'HK −4.95)이 1.6 AU서 약한 플라스마 구동원이라 "cfg renders none". Phase 4는 Pandora cyan과 대비용으로 희미한 가시 오로라를 의도적으로 연출 → AI-합성 Phase 3 기본값에서 이탈. 색은 조성-고정이라 in-window.
Polar rose-magenta aurora (deliberate contrast with Pandora's cyan bioluminescence: planet pink, moon cyan). The H2/He atmosphere *fixes* the color (not a choice): H Balmer-α red + H2 Fulcher / Balmer-β/γ violet. No atomic oxygen, so no Earth-style green. Most of the output is UV (visible aurora faint) — the divergence is "staging it to be visible". The sRGB is extracted at emit from element_plasma_colors.yaml / molecular_plasma_colors.yaml. Owner-override rationale: Phase 3 aurora_present=false (medium) — the quiet G2V stellar wind (log R'HK −4.95) is a weak plasma driver at 1.6 AU, so "cfg renders none". Phase 4 deliberately stages a faint visible aurora for contrast with Pandora's cyan → departure from the AI-synthesized Phase 3 default. The color is composition-fixed, so in-window.

필드Field값Value
aurora극 rose-magenta (H Balmer-α 적색 + H2 Fulcher/Balmer-β/γ 보라)
Phase 3: aurora_present=false (medium)
depends on magnetosphere(자기장 결정) — 오로라 가둠/세기는 자기권에 의존, 그 행 먼저 확정 필요
evidence H2/He 대기가 색을 고정(선택 아님): H Balmer-α 적색 + H2 Fulcher / Balmer-β/γ 보라. 원자 산소 없어 지구식 녹색 불가. 대부분 출력은 UV(가시 오로라 희미).
The H2/He atmosphere fixes the color (not a choice): H Balmer-α red + H2 Fulcher / Balmer-β/γ violet. No atomic oxygen, so no Earth-style green. Most of the output is UV (visible aurora faint).
magnetism.magnetic_field 확정Gated방법론 도출Methodology-derived

표면 dynamo 자기장. B_eq ≈ 170 µT (1.7 G), B_pol ≈ 345 µT. Reiners & Christensen 2010(arXiv:1007.1514) depth-corrected dipole 보간으로 0.378 M_Jup·5.3 Gyr → B_eq 172 µT. 목성 동일식 sanity check 통과. Phase 3 자체도 미근거 ~500µT 추측에서 170µT(방법값)로 교정 완료 → 일치. canonical = docs/reference/planetary-dynamo-scaling.md. caveat: 0.378 M_Jup은 자이언트 영역 하한 — He 성층화로 실제 더 낮을 수도(Saturn ~21µT). conf low–med. group 7 facet-walk(2026-06-22): 오너가 170µT 유지 선택(A) — R&C 스케일링 값 그대로. He 성층화 토성급 (~20–50µT) 약장 대안(B)은 검토 후 기각. 토성의 ~8배·목성의 ~0.4배 = 토성-목성 사이 목성 쪽. 자기권 넓고 오로라/방사선대 받침.
Surface dynamo magnetic field. B_eq ≈ 170 µT (1.7 G), B_pol ≈ 345 µT. Reiners & Christensen 2010 (arXiv:1007.1514) depth-corrected dipole interpolation gives 0.378 M_Jup·5.3 Gyr → B_eq 172 µT. Passes the Jupiter same-equation sanity check. Phase 3 itself was corrected from an ungrounded ~500µT guess to 170µT (the method value) → agreement. canonical = docs/reference/planetary-dynamo-scaling.md. caveat: 0.378 M_Jup is the lower edge of the giant regime — with He stratification the actual value could be lower (Saturn ~21µT). conf low–med. group 7 facet-walk (2026-06-22): the owner chose to keep 170µT (A) — the R&C scaling value as-is. The He-stratified Saturn-class (~20–50µT) weak-field alternative (B) was reviewed and rejected. ~8× Saturn·~0.4× Jupiter = between Saturn and Jupiter, toward Jupiter. Wide magnetosphere, supporting aurora/radiation belts.

필드Field값Value
magnetic_field170 uT
Phase 3: 170 µT (Phase 3도 근거 교정됨)
magnetic_field_polar345 uT
evidence Reiners & Christensen 2010 depth-corrected dipole 보간으로 0.378 M_Jup·5.3 Gyr → B_eq 172 µT. 목성 동일식 sanity check 통과. Phase 3 자체도 미근거 ~500µT에서 170µT로 교정 완료 → 일치. canonical = docs/reference/planetary-dynamo-scaling.md. caveat: 자이언트 하한이라 He 성층화면 더 낮을 수도. conf low–med.
Reiners & Christensen 2010 depth-corrected dipole interpolation gives 0.378 M_Jup·5.3 Gyr → B_eq 172 µT. Passes the Jupiter same-equation sanity check. Phase 3 itself was corrected from an ungrounded ~500µT to 170µT → agreement. canonical = docs/reference/planetary-dynamo-scaling.md. caveat: being at the giant lower edge, with He stratification it could be lower. conf low–med.
docs/reference/planetary-dynamo-scaling.md
magnetism.magnetosphere 확정Gated범위 내In-window

자기권 standoff + 방사선대 범위. R_mp ≈ 23.5 R_p (5위성 전부 자기권 내). Chapman-Ferraro 균형(170µT dipole vs α Cen A 항성풍 ram 0.38 nPa @1.6 AU — 2026-07-12 항성풍 재게이트 Ṁ_A 1→0.5 리플, ^1/6이라 R_mp 21→23.5 소폭). ^1/6 의존이라 입력에 강건(500µT라도 R_mp 33 R_p). Dante(1.54)·Hades(2.07)· Pandora(3.53 R_p)=방사선대, Cassandra(8.4)=중간, Chaos(21)=자기권계면 바로 안쪽(풍 변동 시 주간측 이탈 가능).
Magnetosphere standoff + radiation-belt extent. R_mp ≈ 23.5 R_p (all 5 moons inside the magnetosphere). Chapman-Ferraro balance (170µT dipole vs α Cen A stellar-wind ram 0.38 nPa @1.6 AU — the 2026-07-12 stellar-wind re-gate ripple Ṁ_A 1→0.5, and being ^1/6 it nudges R_mp 21→23.5). The ^1/6 dependence makes it robust to inputs (even at 500µT, R_mp 33 R_p). Dante(1.54)·Hades(2.07)· Pandora(3.53 R_p)=radiation belts, Cassandra(8.4)=intermediate, Chaos(21)=just inside the magnetopause (may exit on the dayside during wind variations).

필드Field값Value
magnetosphere23.5 R_p
Phase 3: R_mp ≈ 23.5 R_p (5위성 전부 자기권 내)
evidence Chapman-Ferraro 균형(170µT dipole vs α Cen A 항성풍 ram 0.38 nPa @1.6 AU, Ṁ_A≈0.5 Ṁ⊙ 재게이트 반영). ^1/6 의존이라 입력에 강건(500µT라도 R_mp 33 R_p). Dante(1.54)·Hades(2.07)·Pandora(3.53 R_p)=방사선대, Cassandra(8.4)=중간, Chaos(21)=자기권계면 바로 안쪽.
Chapman-Ferraro balance (170µT dipole vs α Cen A stellar-wind ram 0.38 nPa @1.6 AU, reflecting the Ṁ_A≈0.5 Ṁ⊙ re-gate). The ^1/6 dependence makes it robust to inputs (even at 500µT, R_mp 33 R_p). Dante(1.54)·Hades(2.07)·Pandora(3.53 R_p)=radiation belts, Cassandra(8.4)=intermediate, Chaos(21)=just inside the magnetopause.
magnetism.radiation_belts 확정Gated방법론 도출Methodology-derived

Dante의 화산 황 토러스가 먹이는 목성형 2벨트계. 구조 전체가 캐넌 위성 위치로 고정된다. 강한 내대는 L 1.3–3.0에 걸치고 정확히 Hades가 사는 자리(2.07 R_p)에서 피크를 찍는다. 슬롯 3.0–4.2는 Pandora(3.53)의 보호 gap이고, 외대는 L 4.2–10에 걸쳐 Cassandra를 잠기게 해 그 "intermediate" 방사선을 만든다(오너 선택 2026-07-24 — 외대를 Cassandra에서 끊는 대안은 기각). Chaos(21 R_p)는 벨트 밖·자기권계면 안을 난다. 벨트 모양은 이 드리프트 셸에 인게임 모델을 수치 피팅한 것이고, 강도는 지구·목성 선량 앵커 사이에서 보정한 뒤 계산된 Kennel–Petschek 상한으로 검산했다. 목성(~1500 rad/h)보다 약한 이유는 Polyphemus의 다이나모 자기장이 목성의 ~40%라서다 — 더 작고 식은 거인은 덜 가두고 덜 가속한다 — 그래도 지구 벨트 피크의 ~29배다. 쌍극 기울기는 magnetic_dipole_tilt_deg 확정 전까지 ~10°(목성 아날로그) 가정. 쌍극 기울기 미확정 → geomagnetic_pole_lat 80 가정(~10°, 목성 아날로그), magnetic_dipole_tilt_deg 확정 시 따름. 길이 단위 전부 R_p.
A Jupiter-style two-belt system, fed by Dante's volcanic sulfur torus. The canon moon positions pin the whole structure: the intense inner belt spans L 1.3–3.0 and peaks right where Hades sits (2.07 R_p); the 3.0–4.2 slot is Pandora's protective gap (3.53); the outer belt spans L 4.2–10 and submerges Cassandra, giving it its "intermediate" radiation (owner pick 2026-07-24 — the alternative of ending the belt at Cassandra was declined). Chaos (21 R_p) flies outside the belts but inside the magnetopause. Belt shapes are numerical fits of the in-game field model to these drift shells; intensities are calibrated between the Earth and Jupiter dose anchors and checked against the computed Kennel–Petschek ceiling. Weaker than Jupiter (~1500 rad/h) because Polyphemus's dynamo field is ~40% of Jupiter's — a smaller, cooler giant traps and accelerates less — yet ~29× Earth's belt peak. Dipole tilt assumed ~10° (Jupiter-analog) until magnetic_dipole_tilt_deg is gated. Dipole tilt not yet decided → geomagnetic_pole_lat 80 assumed (~10°, Jupiter-analog); follows magnetic_dipole_tilt_deg if/when gated. All lengths in R_p.

depends on magnetism.magnetic_field / magnetosphere (위 두 행)
evidence 지오메트리 — 캐넌 위성 L-셸이 경계 짓는 쌍극자 드리프트 셸(태양계 감사에서 천왕성으로 검증한 위성-앵커링)을 fit_belts.py로 Kerbalism SDF에 피팅. IoU 내대 0.97/외대 0.97, 손실원뿔 컷 1.05 R_p, pause 노즈 23.5 R_p는 magnetosphere 행에서(pause_radius = 노즈 × compression). 강도 — Part B 포화 선량-앵커 보간, 10.4 × (170/31)^1.9 = 265 → 300 rad/h 반올림(conf low), 외대 = 내대의 0.1배(토러스-구동 목성 비), 포화 소스 = Dante 토러스 명시. 상한 검산 — kp_limit.py(5행성 검증 완료된 Mauk & Fox 구현 포팅) 기준 벨트 피크의 K–P 상한은 어떤 그럴듯한 토러스 밀도에서도 지구의 5×10²배 이상, 선택값 ~29배는 큰 여유로 통과. 캐넌 사다리 정합 — Hades=피크, Pandora=슬롯, Cassandra=잠김, Chaos=벨트 밖. 캐넌 정합: Hades = 내대 피크 (그 environment.radiation 행), Pandora = 슬롯("두 벨트 사이 gap"), Cassandra = 잠김 intermediate, Chaos = 벨트 밖· 자기권 안. rad/h 값은 conf-low regime call(튜닝 타깃)이며 위성들의 environment.radiation 사다리와 정합.
Geometry: dipole drift shells bounded by the canon moon L-shells (the moon-anchoring validated on Uranus in the solar-system audit), fitted to the Kerbalism SDF by fit_belts.py — IoU 0.97 inner / 0.97 outer, loss-cone cut 1.05 R_p; pause nose 23.5 R_p from the magnetosphere row (pause_radius = nose x compression). Intensity: Part B saturated dose-anchor interpolation, 10.4 x (170/31)^1.9 = 265 -> 300 rad/h rounded (conf low); outer = 0.1x inner (torus-driven Jupiter ratio); the Dante torus is the stated saturating source. Ceiling check: kp_limit.py (5-planet-validated port of the Mauk & Fox implementation) puts the K-P ceiling at >=5e2x Earth for any plausible torus density at the belt peak — the chosen ~29x Earth passes with wide margin. Canon ladder holds: Hades at the peak, Pandora in the slot, Cassandra submerged, Chaos belt-free. Canon consistency: Hades sits at the inner-belt peak (its environment.radiation row), Pandora in the slot (its magnetosphere row's "between-belts gap"), Cassandra submerged intermediate, Chaos belt-free inside the pause. rad/h values are conf-low regime calls (tuning targets), consistent with the moons' environment.radiation ladder.
docs/reference/planetary-magnetosphere-geometry-methodology.mddocs/reference/solar-system-radiation-belts.md
environment.radiation 확정Gated범위 내In-window

위성별 Kerbalism 선량 등급: Dante 극심(>4,500 rem/day) · Hades 심함 · Pandora 중간(거주가능) · Cassandra 낮음 · Chaos 낮음/가변. 선량은 場+공급원으로 결정 — 170µT(목성 ~0.4×, 토성 ~8×, 벨트생성엔 목성比 약함)이지만 Dante(820× Io 화산)가 막대한 SO₂/황 플라스마를 벨트에 공급해 강벨트 성립. Dante 최내곽 극심, Hades 피크 (~2–3 R_p) 근처. 캐넌 ">4,500 rem/day"는 場 발산 없이 이 화산-source로 화해(Dante env.radiation 행 참조). Pandora는 캐넌대로 Polyphemus 두 방사선대 사이(gap)에 위치 + 자체 강한 고유 자기장(Fe핵 dynamo, 지구급)으로 표면 차폐 → 거주가능(모순 아님). 언옵타늄은 물리 grounding서 제외(현실고증) — 그냥 강한 고유장이 방패. 세부는 Pandora magnetism 행. Pandora 거리는 32h 조석고정에 묶여 이동 안 함.
Per-moon Kerbalism dose grades: Dante extreme (>4,500 rem/day) · Hades severe · Pandora moderate (habitable) · Cassandra low · Chaos low/variable. Dose is set by field + source — despite 170µT (~0.4× Jupiter, ~8× Saturn, weak vs Jupiter for belt generation), Dante (820× Io volcanism) supplies enormous SO₂/sulfur plasma to the belt, so a strong belt forms. Dante innermost extreme, Hades near the peak (~2–3 R_p). The canon ">4,500 rem/day" is reconciled via this volcanic source without inflating the field (see the Dante env.radiation row). Pandora, per canon, sits in the gap between Polyphemus's two radiation belts + shields its surface with its own strong intrinsic field (Fe-core dynamo, Earth-class) → habitable (not a contradiction). Unobtanium is excluded from the physics grounding (realism) — it is simply the strong intrinsic field that shields. Details in the Pandora magnetism row. Pandora's distance is fixed by the 32h tidal lock and does not move.

필드Field값Value
radiationDante 극심(>4,500 rem/day) · Hades 심함 · Pandora 중간(거주가능) · Cassandra 낮음 · Chaos 낮음/가변
depends on magnetism.magnetic_field / magnetosphere (위 두 행)
evidence 선량은 場+공급원으로 결정 — 170µT지만 Dante(820× Io 화산)가 막대한 SO₂/황 플라스마를 벨트에 공급해 강벨트 성립. Dante 최내곽 극심, Hades 피크(~2–3 R_p) 근처. 캐넌 ">4,500 rem/day"는 場 발산 없이 이 화산-source로 화해. Pandora는 두 벨트 사이 gap + 자체 강 dipole 차폐로 거주가능.
Dose is set by field + source — despite 170µT, Dante (820× Io volcanism) supplies enormous SO₂/sulfur plasma to the belt, so a strong belt forms. Dante innermost extreme, Hades near the peak (~2–3 R_p). The canon ">4,500 rem/day" is reconciled via this volcanic source without inflating the field. Pandora is habitable via the gap between the two belts + its own strong dipole shielding.
appearance.rings 대체됨Superseded

[SUPERSEDED — rings 행이 대체함] 원안: 디스크를 가로지르는 얇고 어두운 framing line(토성급 아님). Avatar canon = 고리 없음; Beichman §5.3 ring-model 반경 fit 채택(관측 우선)이 원 divergence 근거였음. 미해결이던 "고리 위치 = 로슈 한계 분석"은 별개 작업으로 남아 있었음. 2026-06-21에 얇은 Roche-zone 밀집고리 개념을 폐기하고 흐릿한 연속 E고리(rings 행)로 대체함 — 이 행은 provenance로만 보존하며 live gate 없이 미방출.
[SUPERSEDED — replaced by the rings row] Original: a thin dark framing line across the disk (not Saturn-class). Avatar canon = no rings; the original divergence basis was adopting the Beichman §5.3 ring-model radius fit (observation first). The unresolved "ring location = Roche-limit analysis" remained as separate work. On 2026-06-21 the thin Roche-zone dense-ring concept was discarded and replaced by a faint continuous E-ring (the rings row) — this row is kept for provenance only, with no live gate and not emitted.

rings 확정Gated오너 확정Owner override

흐릿한 Chaos-fed E고리(토성 E링 아날로그) 채택. canon "고리 없음"을 존중하는 거의 안 보이는 wisp 수준. Chaos가 공급, Cassandra가 안쪽 양치기. 두 환형으로 나뉘고(800k~1.41M·1.59M~2.5M km) 그 사이 간극 (1.41M~1.59M)에서 Chaos(1.5M km)가 공전. 고리면은 Chaos 평균면(Laplace, 역행 inc ~175° rel 공전면)에 맞춤 — epoch 순간면(179°) 아님(세차 대응, 2026-07-17). 밝기 +0.05 R_Jup (τ≈9e-5, 등가원반 ~23k km = Beichman 토성½ 단면의 13%)이라 행성은 1.0 R_Jup(bulk.radius 게이트값) 유지하며 ~1.05 R_Jup 관측 플럭스 정합. Kopernicus 고리는 원형 동심 annulus만 가능(이심률 불가)이라 Ring 노드 2개로 방출(안쪽 800k~1.41M, 바깥 1.59M~2.5M km), 그 사이가 간극. 둘 다 Chaos 평균면 공유. 확산 E고리는 정상상태에서 축대칭이라(근점 세차 무작위화) 원형 annulus가 충실하고, 작아진 Chaos e(0.02)는 간극 여유로 흡수됨. group 9 facet-walk(2026-06-22): 오너 선택(A) = 푸른 흰빛 얼음-먼지 고리. 고운 물-얼음 알갱이가 파장에 따라 산란(작은 입자 → 청색 우세, 토성 E-ring/엔셀라두스 선례). → Chaos를 얼음체로 확정(group 10 satellites가 상속; Phoebe형 어두운 탄소질 대안 기각). 색 ≈ 옅은 ice-blue #cdd9e4(거의 안 보이는 wisp라 opacity τ≈9e-5로 시각 임팩트 작음). 어두운/적갈 탄소질(C) 대안은 미채택. feed(2026-06-23, art-first): 공급원 Chaos가 물 cryovolcanic 플룸으로 고리를 먹임(엔셀라두스→토성 E-고리 동형). 이는 'E-고리' 명명을 현실과 정합시킴. 물리 caveat=Chaos 20 R_p서 조석열 부족(Chaos.surface divergence_note); 그래도 art 채택. sputtering/승화는 보조 공급. 오너-오버라이드 근거: 고리 간극은 의도된 아트 디렉션(art > 고증). 물리적으론 Chaos가 못 비우지만, Kopernicus 고리는 평면 디스크라 역행으로 기운 Chaos가 연속 고리에 묻히면 고리면이 매 공전마다 위성을 관통해 보임 → 깨짐. 이를 피하려 Chaos 궤도를 비우는 간극을 둠. 고리 평면 앵커(2026-07-17): Chaos 궤도면은 Principia에서 세차·libration하나 Kopernicus 고리는 정적 디스크라, epoch 순간면(179°)에 맞추면 시간이 갈수록 어긋남. → 고리를 Chaos 평균면(Laplace, 역행 inc ~175° rel 공전면)에 앵커해 libration이 평균면 둘레 ±대칭(RMS 5.7°)이 되게 함 — 수백 년 캠페인에도 코히런트(단조 이탈 X). 뷰어(animate_orbits.py)가 emit 전에 잡아낸 궤도축 이슈.
Adopts a faint Chaos-fed E-ring (Saturn E-ring analog). An almost-invisible wisp level that respects the canon "no rings". Chaos supplies it, Cassandra is the inner shepherd. It splits into two annuli (800k~1.41M·1.59M~2.5M km) with a gap between (1.41M~1.59M) where Chaos (1.5M km) orbits. The ring plane is set to Chaos's mean plane (Laplace, retrograde inc ~175° rel. orbital plane) — not the epoch instantaneous plane (179°) (precession handling, 2026-07-17). Brightness +0.05 R_Jup (τ≈9e-5, equivalent disk ~23k km = 13% of Beichman's Saturn-½ cross-section), so the planet keeps 1.0 R_Jup (the bulk.radius gate value) while matching the ~1.05 R_Jup observed flux. Kopernicus rings can only be circular concentric annuli (no eccentricity), so it is emitted as 2 Ring nodes (inner 800k~1.41M, outer 1.59M~2.5M km) with a gap between. Both share Chaos's mean plane. A diffuse E-ring is axisymmetric at steady state (perihelion precession randomized), so a circular annulus is faithful, and the reduced Chaos e (0.02) is absorbed into the gap margin. group 9 facet-walk (2026-06-22): owner choice (A) = a blue-white ice-dust ring. Fine water-ice grains scatter wavelength-dependently (small particles → blue dominance; Saturn E-ring/Enceladus precedent). → Chaos confirmed as an icy body (inherited by group 10 satellites; the Phoebe-type dark carbonaceous alternative rejected). Color ≈ pale ice-blue #cdd9e4 (an almost-invisible wisp, so at opacity τ≈9e-5 the visual impact is small). The dark/red-brown carbonaceous (C) alternative is not adopted. feed (2026-06-23, art-first): the supplier Chaos feeds the ring with water cryovolcanic plumes (Enceladus→Saturn E-ring isomorphism). This aligns the 'E-ring' naming with reality. Physics caveat=insufficient tidal heat at Chaos's 20 R_p (Chaos.surface divergence_note); adopted as art anyway. sputtering/sublimation is a secondary supply. Owner-override rationale: The ring gap is intentional art direction (art > authenticity). Physically Chaos cannot clear it, but because Kopernicus rings are a flat disk, if the retrograde-tilted Chaos were embedded in a continuous ring, the ring plane would appear to pass through the moon every orbit → breaks. To avoid this, a gap is placed to vacate Chaos's orbit. Ring-plane anchor (2026-07-17): Chaos's orbital plane precesses·librates in Principia, but a Kopernicus ring is a static disk, so matching it to the epoch instantaneous plane (179°) drifts off over time. → The ring is anchored to Chaos's mean plane (Laplace, retrograde inc ~175° rel. orbital plane) so libration is ±symmetric about the mean plane (RMS 5.7°) — coherent even over centuries-long campaigns (no monotonic drift). An orbital-axis issue caught by the viewer (animate_orbits.py) before emit.

필드Field값Value
ring_structure2-annulus: 안쪽 800000–1410000 km / 바깥 1590000–2500000 km
ring_inner_annulus_km800000–1410000
ring_outer_annulus_km1590000–2500000
ring_gap_km1410000–1590000 (Chaos at 1500000 km)
ring_opacity9e-05
ring_color#cdd9e4
ring_planeChaos MEAN (Laplace) plane — retrograde inc ~175° rel. parent orbit (NOT the epoch 179° snapshot); anchor static ring here so Chaos librates ±sym about it
ring_compositionwater-ice dust (blue-white)
ring_brightness_R_jup0.05
evidence 물리적 간극은 불가 — 테스트입자 시뮬(Sim B, ring_clearing.py 2000yr, results/_ring_clearing)에서 Chaos는 질량비 μ≈7.5e-7로 너무 작아 어떤 간극도 못 비움(Chaos 반장축의 입자까지 생존). 그래서 갭은 동역학이 아닌 렌더링 목적의 의도적 부여. 간극을 좁히려 Chaos e를 0.10→0.02로 낮춤(results/_chaos_e002, STABLE) — 반경 흔들림 ±150k→±30k km라 ~180k km 갭이면 깔끔히 비움. 밝기는 면적∝R²로 직교 합산이라 "겉보기 +0.05 R_Jup"는 등가원반 ~0.32 R_Jup(~23k km)에 해당. Beichman 2025 §5.3(arXiv:2508.03814) "Planet Ring System Models" — 그들의 선호 모델은 Roche 안쪽 광학적으로 두꺼운 고리(토성½ 단면, 등가원반 64,000 km)이고, 우리 흐릿한 E고리는 그들이 제시한 광학적으로 얇은 먼지 대안(Kennedy 2011 불규칙위성 분쇄)에 해당. 고리면 세차 검증(2026-07-17, dense 8000-snapshot leapfrog 2000yr, results/_principia2000_dense): Chaos 평균면 = 역행 inc 175.4° rel 공전면(sim-frame normal [0.50,-0.80,-0.33]); 순간면↔평균면 10.9°; 평균면 둘레 libration RMS 5.7°/max 12.6°(주기 ~56yr). epoch면 고정 시 이탈 ~±6°(50yr에 되돌아옴)이나 1000/2000yr엔 14/18°까지 커짐 — 평균면 앵커로 유계화. 동적 추종(고리↔라이브 궤도면 연동)은 C# 플러그인 장기과제(cfg 불가).
A physical gap is impossible — in a test-particle sim (Sim B, ring_clearing.py 2000yr, results/_ring_clearing), Chaos is too small at mass ratio μ≈7.5e-7 to clear any gap (even particles at Chaos's semi-major axis survive). So the gap is intentional for rendering purposes, not dynamics. To narrow the gap, Chaos e was lowered 0.10→0.02 (results/_chaos_e002, STABLE) — the radial excursion ±150k→±30k km, so a ~180k km gap clears it cleanly. Brightness sums orthogonally as area∝R², so an "apparent +0.05 R_Jup" corresponds to an equivalent disk ~0.32 R_Jup (~23k km). Beichman 2025 §5.3 (arXiv:2508.03814) "Planet Ring System Models" — their preferred model is an optically thick ring inside Roche (Saturn-½ cross-section, equivalent disk 64,000 km), and our faint E-ring corresponds to their optically thin dust alternative (Kennedy 2011 irregular-satellite grinding). Ring-plane precession verification (2026-07-17, dense 8000-snapshot leapfrog 2000yr, results/_principia2000_dense): Chaos mean plane = retrograde inc 175.4° rel. orbital plane (sim-frame normal [0.50,-0.80,-0.33]); instantaneous↔mean plane 10.9°; libration about the mean plane RMS 5.7°/max 12.6° (period ~56yr). Fixing to the epoch plane, the excursion is ~±6° (returns within 50yr) but grows to 14/18° at 1000/2000yr — bounded by the mean-plane anchor. Dynamic tracking (ring↔live orbital plane linkage) is a long-term C#-plugin task (not possible in cfg).
2508.03814
gameplay 확정Gated범위 내In-window

가스자이언트 — 고체 표면 없음 → 착륙 상황 미발생, 과학은 대기-비행("X 상공 비행")/우주뿐. 단 biome map 있음 (Jool/ RSS Sol 가스자이언트 선례 — 표면 없어도 위경도 biome map으로 비행 바이옴 정의). 폴리페무스 바이옴 = 위도 띠(적도대/북·남 온대 belt/북·남극) + 시그니처 폭풍(깊은 파란 눈) 독자 바이옴(group 6 랜드마크 = 과학 명소). ScienceValues 전체 블록 정의(landed/splashed는 도달 불가라 토큰값, inert). SOI=질량서 자동(조정 불요). timewarp=대기 위 표준. difficulty=두 층: (1) 임무 난도=플래그십(접근=항성간 여정 자체); (2) 발견 난도 =ResearchBodies IGNORELEVELS, candidate라 T F F F (researchbodies-cfg 스킬 db-mapping.md 기준, identity.discoverability 참조). 정정(2026-06-22): 가스자이언트도 biome map 보유(Jool/Sol 선례) — 이전 'Sun.cfg=biome 없음'은 태양 기준 오판.
Gas giant — no solid surface → no landing situation; science is atmospheric-flight ("flying above X")/space only. But it has a biome map (Jool/RSS Sol gas-giant precedent — even without a surface, flight biomes are defined via a lat/lon biome map). Polyphemus biomes = latitude bands (equatorial zone/N·S temperate belts/N·S poles) + a signature-storm (deep blue eye) dedicated biome (group 6 landmark = a science landmark). Full ScienceValues block defined (landed/splashed are token values since unreachable, inert). SOI=auto from mass (no tuning). timewarp=standard above the atmosphere. difficulty=two layers: (1) mission difficulty=flagship (approach=the interstellar journey itself); (2) discovery difficulty =ResearchBodies IGNORELEVELS, T F F F as a candidate (per the researchbodies-cfg skill db-mapping.md, see identity.discoverability). Correction (2026-06-22): gas giants also have a biome map (Jool/Sol precedent) — the earlier 'Sun.cfg=no biome' was a misjudgment based on the Sun.

필드Field값Value
science_biomes위도 띠(적도대/북·남 온대 belt/북·남극) + 시그니처 폭풍(깊은 파란 눈) 독자 바이옴
Equatorial #C9A26BNorth Temperate #E4D3B0South Temperate #A6784ENorth Polar #9DB0C4South Polar #B0A0AEThe Eye #244C8A

timewarp_limits대기 위 표준passthrough
difficulty임무=플래그십 · 발견=ResearchBodies IGNORELEVELS T F F F (candidate)
evidence 정정(2026-06-22): 가스자이언트도 biome map 보유(Jool/Sol 선례) — 이전 'Sun.cfg=biome 없음'은 태양 기준 오판. 비행 바이옴=위도 띠 + 대storm. ScienceValues 전체 정의(surface 토큰). 발견은 ResearchBodies (identity.discoverability).
Correction (2026-06-22): gas giants also have a biome map (Jool/Sol precedent) — the earlier 'Sun.cfg=no biome' was a misjudgment based on the Sun. Flight biomes=latitude bands + a large storm. Full ScienceValues defined (surface tokens). Discovery via ResearchBodies (identity.discoverability).
satellites 확정Gated범위 내In-window

판도라 + canon 명명 5위성 (Dante·Hades·Pandora·Cassandra·Chaos). 핵심 발견: 카논의 "Hades가 Dante에 그레이징"을 e=0.30 직역하면 100yr 내 이젝션 → 조석가열은 궤도교차 아닌 유지된 e(Io 강제e=0.0041) → e=0.05 + 작은 moonlet로 교정. 5위성 body def(mass_kg·radius_km + 6요소 a_km·e·inc_deg·lan_deg·argp_deg· ma_deg·epoch — Kopernicus Orbit ↔ Principia 1:1, 2026-07-11 emit-shaping)는 아래 moons: 리스트, 스캔 상세는 stability_scans:, provenance는 designations/rejected/decided/deferred 블록 참조.
Pandora + the canon named 5 moons (Dante·Hades·Pandora·Cassandra·Chaos). Key finding: literally reading the canon's "Hades grazes Dante" as e=0.30 gives ejection within 100yr → tidal heating comes not from orbit-crossing but from a sustained e (Io forced e=0.0041) → corrected to e=0.05 + small moonlets. The 5-moon body defs (mass_kg·radius_km + 6 elements a_km·e·inc_deg·lan_deg·argp_deg· ma_deg·epoch — Kopernicus Orbit ↔ Principia 1:1, 2026-07-11 emit-shaping) are in the moons: list below, scan details in stability_scans:, and provenance in the designations/rejected/decided/deferred blocks.

moona (km)einc°Ω°ω°M°epochmass (kg)R (km)

최내곽 화산 moonlet(1.54 R_p). 고체라 강체 로슈(~48.5k) 지배 → ~110k(직전 100k도)는 2배+ 밖 안전.

내부 조석열은 있으나 [FILM]대로 회색 가니메데형 표면(텍토닉 홈, 비발광) — [GAME] >900K 붉은 잉걸은 기각. Dante 110k일 때 135k는 갭 부족으로 이탈 → 148k로 밀어 갭 복원(주기비 1.56). e≈0.05 adopted given.

canon: 지름 11,447km(반경 5724), 거주가능. 질량=옵션 B(중력 0.8g 고정 → 0.645 M⊕=3.85e24, 밀도 0.89 ρ⊕ 현실적). canon 0.72 M⊕/1.2 ρ⊕는 내부불일치라 비채택. ✅ 3.85e24 재시뮬 STABLE 검증(results/_pandora_massB, 1000yr TRACE+J2, |ΔE/E| 7.6e-9, Pandora e≤0.0075 — 스냅샷 e 0.00517도 이내). 조석고정 32h(canon 27h 대신, 해양 robustness)→a 도출(스냅샷 +40km는 주기 +0.02%뿐, 32h일 유지). 폴리페무스 하늘서 ~32°.

└ 설계 t=0design t=06000000.05176.0247·300···
2번째 큰 달, 지름>6500km(canon), N-H 대기. 역행(canon) 보존, Chaos와 거의 동일평면 역행(viewer 184 정규화). E고리 안쪽 양치기.
Chaos1576906.30.01488176.475269.16187.0335.2105.4e20400
└ 설계 t=0design t=015000000.02179.0274·60···
Miranda형 균열. 역행(canon) 보존, Cassandra와 거의 동일평면 역행(viewer 181 정규화). 역행이라 0.7 R_Hill까지 안정. E고리 공급원 — 고리면=Chaos 궤도면(설계 평균 기준; 스냅샷 lan 269). 평균 a 1.5M 주위 진동(스냅샷 1.577M, r 1.55–1.60M — 고리 간극 1.41–1.59M은 평균 기준 설계, results/_chaos_e002 ±30k 스윙 검증). e 0.10→0.02로 낮춰 고리 갭을 좁힘 — 고리면이 위성 관통 안 하게.
evidence IAS15 1000yr (α Cen A·B 두 별 포함 N-body, 외곽 2위성 역행 반영): CHAOTIC_BUT_HILL_STABLE — 5위성 전부 Hill-bound·calm, 이젝션 0, Hades e 0.032–0.052 유지, Pandora 0.02 R_Hill. 바너드/TRAPPIST-1과 같은 등급 (갇힘, 게임 안전). results/_moons_alpha_centauri. 최종 로스터·J2 재검증은 stability_scans.final_2026_06_21 / stability_scans.j2_confirm 참조.
IAS15 1000yr (N-body including both stars α Cen A·B, reflecting the two outer moons' retrograde): CHAOTIC_BUT_HILL_STABLE — all 5 moons Hill-bound·calm, ejections 0, Hades e 0.032–0.052 sustained, Pandora 0.02 R_Hill. Same grade as Barnard/TRAPPIST-1 (bound, game-safe). results/_moons_alpha_centauri. See stability_scans.final_2026_06_21 / stability_scans.j2_confirm for the final roster·J2 re-verification.
Alpha Centauri A →
